{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Aether manipulation
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Basic [[Aether manipulation]] includes starting fires, making light, and telekinesis.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c51">''The Engineer'', chapter 51</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“All I can use is basic Aether manipulation,” Varic continued. “Start fires, make light, and a little telekinesis.”<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c51" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
